tracks.description:
From the Simien Mountains to Lalibela — the ancient soul of Ethiopia. 🇪🇹

Traditional Ethiopian instruments: krar (ክራር) lyre, masinko (ማሲንቆ) fiddle, kebero (ከበሮ) drum, washint (ዋሽንት) bamboo flute.
Pentatonic scales rooted in 3000 years of musical heritage.

የኢትዮጵያ ባህላዊ ሙዚቃ — ከሲሚየን ተራሮች እስከ ላሊበላ
